growth_records.strain: field-sampled puff-shaped colonies, Station ALOHA (22°45'N 158°00'W), North Pacific Subtropical Gyre, HOT cruise #265

up.compound: dissolved inorganic carbon (DIC, CO2) — C fixation (DIC->POC)
up.method: 13C-DIC stable-isotope tracer incubation + EA-IRMS, 25 colonies pooled/5 vials
15N2 stable-isotope tracer incubation + EA-IRMS, 25 colonies pooled/5 vials

up.units: pmol O2 colony-1 h-1 equivalent (reported 1751 ± 1360, range 529-5282; from O2 microsensor flux normalised to colony)
up.method: Clark-type O2 microelectrode profiles (dark), Fick's first law, 11 profiles

sec.units: pmol N colony-1 h-1 (daytime; range 7.3-41.2; night N/D); ~10% of net N2 fixation
pmol O2 colony-1 h-1 equivalent (reported 2868 ± 2333, range -1752 to 6849; from O2 microsensor flux normalised to colony)
sec.method: Clark-type O2 microelectrode profiles (light 1000 µmol photons m-2 s-1), 21 profiles

sec.compound: dissolved free amino acids (e.g., glutamate) release
sec.units: pmol glutamate colony-1 (release rate, from cited/complementary data)

yields.note: C:N (POC:PON) ratio of colonies = 6.5 (Table 2); no Yxs reported. Daytime single-cell C growth rate 6x N2-based growth rate.

growth_records.cite: Klawonn et al. Distinct nitrogen cycling and steep chemical gradients in Trichodesmium colonies. The ISME Journal (2020). DOI:10.1038/s41396-019-0514-9. [PMC6976679]
growth_records.snippet: DIC -> POC 2097.6 (day) / 66.4 (night) pmol colony-1 h-1; N2 -> PON 212.3 (day) / 0.9 (night); DIC -> Single-cell C fixation 0.20 ± 0.03 d-1 (day); N2 -> NH4+ 19.4 ± 14.0 (7.3-41.2); Oxygen production 2868 ± 2333 (light); Oxygen respiration
growth_records.notes: Field-sampled Trichodesmium (marine cyanobacterium, prokaryote) colony incubations; NOT a GEM/13C-MFA cultivation study, and rates are per-COLONY (pmol colony-1 h-1), NOT biomass-normalised to gDW, so uptake/secretion are not directly GEM-constraint units. GROWTH RATE: single-cell C-fixation-based specific growth rate reported as 0.20 ± 0.03 d-1 (daytime) and 0.0012 ± 0.0006 d-1 (night) (Table 3, footnote: derived from Table 3 of Eichner et al. 2019 [ref 23], corrected for controls). Converted to per-h: 0.20 d-1 / 24 = 0.00833 h-1. Doubling time td = ln2/mu = 0.6931/0.20 d-1 = 3.466 d = 3.466 x 24 = 83.2 h. N2-fixation-based single-cell growth rate 0.03 ± 0.02 d-1 (day). Daytime C growth rate stated to be ~6x N growth rate. All listed pmol colony-1 h-1 net rates are daytime (6AM-6PM) values with night values noted in parentheses; N/D = not detectable (nitrification, denitrification, N2O from most pathways). Nitrate/nitrite reduction net rates (also measured, potential rates): NO3- -> NO2- 5.7 (day)/4.8 (night); NO3- -> NH4+ 5.0/10.9; NO2- -> NH4+ 1.6/1.1; residual NO3- consumption 65.7/67.8 pmol colony-1 h-1 — these are 'potential/net' rates because DIN was enriched 55-94% by 15N additions (authors' caveat), so only N2/C fixation and ammonium release are treated as true in-situ rates. O2 fluxes originally 0.039 ± 0.032 nmol cm-2 s-1 (light) and -0.024 ± 0.019 (dark) per unit colony surface, normalised to whole colony as production 2868 / respiration 1751 pmol colony-1 h-1. Medium = natural filtered seawater (salinity 34.4, 27°C in situ); full chemical composition not stated. POC ~ (Table 2) and cells ~6000 per colony (Vm normalisation used 6000 cells). No CO2/formate/ethanol/organic-acid secretion (photoautotroph).
